name: Magi Tokens [beta]
description: Deploy and manage your own tokens on the Magi network

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initialize a new token with name, symbol, decimals, and optional max supply.

parameters.name: Token Name
parameters.hintText: The name of your token (e.g. 'My Token').

parameters.name: Symbol
parameters.hintText: The ticker symbol for your token (e.g. 'MTK').

parameters.name: Decimals
parameters.hintText: Number of decimal places.

parameters.name: Max Supply
parameters.hintText: Maximum token supply. Leave empty for unlimited supply.

functions.name: mint
functions.description: Mint new tokens to the caller's balance. Only the contract owner can mint.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: The amount of tokens to mint.

functions.name: burn
functions.description: Burn tokens from the caller's balance, reducing the total supply.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: The amount of tokens to burn.

functions.name: transfer
functions.description: Transfer tokens from the caller to another address.

parameters.name: To
parameters.hintText: The recipient address.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: The amount of tokens to transfer.

functions.name: transferFrom
functions.description: Transfer tokens on behalf of another address using an approved allowance.

parameters.name: From
parameters.hintText: The address to transfer tokens from.

parameters.name: To
parameters.hintText: The recipient address.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: The amount of tokens to transfer.

functions.name: approve
functions.description: Approve another address to spend tokens on your behalf.

parameters.name: Spender
parameters.hintText: The address allowed to spend your tokens.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: The maximum amount the spender can use.

functions.name: increaseAllowance
functions.description: Increase the allowance granted to a spender.

parameters.name: Spender
parameters.hintText: The spender address.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: The amount to increase the allowance by.

functions.name: decreaseAllowance
functions.description: Decrease the allowance granted to a spender.

parameters.name: Spender
parameters.hintText: The spender address.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.hintText: The amount to decrease the allowance by.

functions.name: changeOwner
functions.description: Transfer contract ownership to a new address. Only the current owner can call this.

parameters.name: New Owner
parameters.hintText: The address of the new contract owner.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Pause the contract, preventing all transfers and minting. Owner only.

functions.name: unpause
functions.description: Unpause the contract, re-enabling transfers and minting. Owner only.

functions.name: balanceOf
functions.description: Query the token balance of an account.

parameters.name: Account
parameters.hintText: The address to check the balance of.

functions.name: totalSupply
functions.description: Query the current total supply of the token.

functions.name: getOwner
functions.description: Query the current owner of the contract.

functions.name: allowance
functions.description: Query the remaining allowance a spender has for an owner's tokens.

parameters.name: Owner
parameters.hintText: The token owner address.

parameters.name: Spender
parameters.hintText: The spender address.

functions.name: getInfo
functions.description: Query the token metadata: name, symbol, decimals, max supply, and total supply.

functions.name: isPaused
functions.description: Query whether the contract is currently paused.
